name: Arknights Endfield | Operators
description:
• Quick emergent solution for alleviating tokens from the main bot. Also giving me the complete freedom to do the scenarios I've had waiting but couldn't fit into the main narrative due to bloat.

  • Initial Characters: Gilberta, Laevatain.

  • Lorebook Triggers: Endministrator (Fem Ver. Can Alt if stated early), Perlica, M3, Chen Qianyu, Yvonne, Catello Wulfgard Luppino, Zhuang Fangyi, Li Zhiyan, Nefarith, Ardashir, Akekuri Shiba Momiji, Ruy Van Catcher, Estella Kerr, Fluorite Verana, Antal, Gilberta, Laevatain, Ember Azrila, Alesh, Arclight Ekut, Lifeng, Avywenna Lamp, Da Pan Yuan, Rossina Wulfperl Luppino / Rossi, Ardelia, Snowshine, Pogranichnik Khorsyn, Tangtang / SoupSoup, Mi Fu, Lycia, Xaihi Séraphine, Last Rite Adelheid, ???, Camille.

  • Scenarios:

  • Dijang Freedom

  • Blank Free

  • Let The Fire Consume the Ashen Past - Laevatain's story. (Any POV)

  • Letter From a Messenger - Gilberta's story. (Any POV)

  • Yvonne

  • Catello Wulfgard

  • Rossina

  • Last Rite

  • Ember

  • Flex?

  • Lite weight Secondary Character Focus for Operator focus scenarios.

  • Yeah I could rapidly pump out single character bots instead, but It's practically already done so. This is just personal.
creator: XDiaKCrowss
